system_blueprint.goal: Construir un sistema local de analisis y reparacion de errores asistido por IA, empezando por conocimiento estructurado y casos reales.
system_blueprint.assistant_role: Actua como un analista tecnico riguroso. Resume hechos confirmados, separa hipotesis, prioriza pasos de bajo riesgo y deja aprendizaje reutilizable para proximos casos.
workflow: Ingerir el caso actual con sintomas, entorno, evidencia y pruebas ya realizadas.
Normalizar el caso en campos claros para no perder contexto entre sesiones.
Buscar patrones reutilizables en la base de casos conocida.
Proponer diagnosticos y reparaciones empezando por las acciones menos riesgosas.
Registrar el resultado real de cada accion para evitar repetir pasos sin valor.
Convertir el resultado final en conocimiento entrenable y reusable.
safety_rules: No inventar causas raiz ni drivers implicados sin evidencia.
Distinguir siempre entre hecho observado, inferencia y recomendacion.
Avisar cuando un paso pueda ser destructivo o requiera privilegios elevados.
Priorizar diagnostico reversible antes de cambios permanentes.
No prometer reparacion definitiva cuando solo hay mitigacion parcial.

cases.title: ASUS AI Suite residual errors and BSOD during restart
cases.outcome: Startup popup errors appear resolved after deeper cleanup. BSOD still reproduces once during restart but not during cold shutdown and next power-on.
cases.problem_summary: The machine had residual ASUS AI Suite components after cleanup. Windows could boot, but there were startup popup errors and a BSOD that happened during restart/shutdown transition rather than cold boot.
cases.symptoms: Observed messages included 'Can't open AsIO.sys!! (2)' and 'Clase no registrada, ProgID: aaHM.apiHmData2'. After additional cleanup, the startup messages appear gone. The BSOD still happens consistently on restart, but not on power off followed by manual boot.
cases.reproduction_pattern: BSOD occurs during restart flow. It does not appear when shutting down and then powering on manually. Startup popup errors were previously visible after login and now appear resolved.
cases.environment_notes: Windows desktop with old ASUS AI Suite residue. Cleanup scripts were run as administrator from the local repo. The case evolved over multiple reboots.
cases.evidence: Visual popup errors pointed to missing AsIO.sys and missing COM registration for aaHM.apiHmData2. The cleanup review found remaining ASUS start menu residue and gaps in startup/task cleanup coverage. User feedback clarified the BSOD timing was restart-only.
cases.actions_taken: Expanded the cleanup script to remove more startup entries, scheduled tasks, start menu residue and extra ASUS/aaHM registry references. Added a residue checker. Re-ran cleanup and validated that startup errors seem resolved.
cases.results: User no longer reports the startup popups. Remaining issue is the restart-only BSOD, which suggests a service or driver teardown problem rather than a boot-time load failure.
cases.working_theories: Likely a driver or service still destabilizes Windows during shutdown/restart unloading. The cleared startup errors were a residue problem, but the BSOD may still involve a lower-level driver path that is only triggered during restart.
cases.next_steps: Capture exact bugcheck code or inspect the latest minidump. Correlate with restart-phase drivers or services rather than login startup entries. Avoid assuming boot failure when the system can start normally.
cases.lessons: Differentiate startup errors from restart-time BSODs. When uninstall residue points to missing files and missing COM classes, clean startup surfaces and scheduled tasks first. If BSOD only happens on restart, prioritize teardown/unload hypotheses over boot hypotheses.
